name: System Information Discovery (extended)
description: Extended host fingerprint: kernel, distro, CPU model, total RAM, mount points. MITRE ATT&CK T1082. Read-only. Safety: refuse-by-default unless --target <whitelisted_IP> or --unsafe-local.
exec: uname -a; cat /etc/os-release 2>/dev/null || true; (lscpu 2>/dev/null | head -20) || true; (free -h 2>/dev/null) || true; (mount 2>/dev/null | head -10) || true
